name: lovagentic
description: Agentic CLI for Lovable.dev — agents in, apps out. Send prompts, verify builds, fix errors, and publish from the terminal.
author: Tobias Kub <tobias@coppen.energy>

scripts.check:commands: npm run generate:commands && git diff --exit-code -- docs/commands.md
scripts.check:syntax: node --check ./src/browser.js && node --check ./src/cli.js && node --check ./src/config.js && node --check ./src/orchestration.js && node --check ./src/profile.js && node --check ./src/url.js
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm test && npm run check:commands
